_comment: Copy to your project's .mcp.json or merge into ~/.claude/mcp_servers.json. Points at the v0.2 stdio shim (pseudolife-mcp.exe), which connects every session to the shared daemon and auto-starts it if absent. Replace C:\path\to\PseudoLife-MCP with your clone path. The DATABASE_URL matches ops/docker-compose.yml defaults. For the daemon-less v0.1 escape hatch use command python -m pseudolife_memory.cli embedded instead.
